deviceInstall.title: Client Download
deviceInstall.platformSupport: Supports iOS, Android, Windows, macOS and other platforms
deviceInstall.multiDeviceSync: Log in with the same account on different devices to enjoy multi-device sync service
deviceInstall.contactSupport: For technical support, please contact customer service
deviceInstall.androidInstallCardDesc: Connect via USB, step-by-step guided, auto-install to your phone

androidInstall.title: Android USB Install
androidInstall.subtitle: Install the app to your Android phone via USB cable
androidInstall.desktopOnly: This feature is only available on desktop
androidInstall.step1Desc: Follow the image guide below to enable "Developer Options" and "USB Debugging" on your phone
androidInstall.step2Desc: Connect your phone to the computer via USB, tap "Allow" on the phone prompt
androidInstall.step3Desc: Click start install, the app will be pushed to your phone automatically
androidInstall.noDeviceHint: Please check that USB cable is connected and debugging is authorised on your phone
androidInstall.usbTrustPrompt: Please tap "Allow USB Debugging" on your phone screen
androidInstall.otherBrandHint: General steps: Settings → About Phone → Tap Build Number 7 times → Back to Settings → Developer Options → Enable USB Debugging
androidInstall.huaweiWarningTitle: HarmonyOS NEXT does not support Android app installation
androidInstall.huaweiWarningDesc: Please check your Huawei phone's OS version: go to "Settings" → "About Phone". If it shows "HarmonyOS NEXT", ADB installation is not possible. Devices showing "EMUI" or "HarmonyOS 4.0 or below" can install normally.
androidInstall.huawei_step1: Open "Settings", scroll to bottom and tap "About Phone"
androidInstall.huawei_step2: Tap "HarmonyOS Version" 7 times until you see developer mode enabled
androidInstall.xiaomi_step4: Tap "MIUI Version" 7 times until you see developer mode enabled
androidInstall.vivo_step4: Tap "Software Version" 7 times until you see developer mode enabled
androidInstall.oppo_step1: Settings → About Phone → Tap "Build Number" 7 times
androidInstall.oppo_step2: Back to Settings → Other Settings → Developer Options → Enable "USB Debugging"
androidInstall.samsung_step1: Settings → About Device → Tap "Build Number" 7-10 times
androidInstall.samsung_step2: Back to Settings → Developer Options → Enable "USB Debugging"

memberSelection.addMemberHint: After adding members, you can purchase authorisation for them. Members can use their email to log in and use the service.
memberSelection.emailAlreadyInUse: Email already in use, please use another email
memberSelection.addMemberFailedRetry: Failed to add member, please retry
memberSelection.getMembersFailedRetry: Failed to get member list, please retry
